name: Squash- Broccoli Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into 1-inch pieces.
2. Slice the squash.
3. Cook mushrooms in a nonstick frypan until lightly browned.
4. Add remaining ingredients except lemon rind to the pan.
5. Cover and gently boil for about 10 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
6. Drain any excess liquid.
7. Gently stir in the grated lemon rind before serving.
